message:
feat(diagnostic): Cx-first generate_bundle_with_cx (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Add `generate_bundle_with_cx(cx, config, layout, storage, opts)` as a
Cx-first sibling of `generate_bundle`. Pre-flight `cx.checkpoint()?`
gates the (potentially expensive) bundle-generation path used by
`ft diag bundle` — the CLI invocation can be cancelled at entry before
any storage work is done. Delegates to `generate_bundle` for the actual
work so the legacy path remains authoritative.

Regression test `generate_bundle_with_cx_matches_legacy` pins the
shape: an uncancelled cx produces the same file set and manifest
structure as the legacy path (>=9 files, manifest.json +
environment.json + db_health.json all present).

Verified via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/
ft-rusticmaple-target): 78/78 diagnostic tests pass.

Part of the ongoing ft-xbnl0.2.3 Cx-first migration — additive,
legacy path preserved.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
